mnemonics.title: Hypervisor Types
mnemonics.content: BARE Metal Is Best: Bare-metal (Type 1) hypervisors run directly on hardware for better performance, while Hosted (Type 2) run on an operating system.

mnemonics.title: Virtualization Benefits
mnemonics.content: ACE-FS: Agility, Cost reduction, Efficiency, Flexibility, Scalability - the key benefits of virtualization for data center automation.

mnemonics.title: Automation Technologies
mnemonics.content: LIT-PS: Live Migration, Infrastructure as Code, Templates, Provisioning, Scaling - key technologies enabling automation.
